place_name: SHOWROOM VIGLACERA - CÔNG TY CP TM VIGLACERA CHI NHÁNH MIỀN NAM Nhà cung cấp thiết bị xây dựng · 34 Nguyễn Cơ Thạch
review_text:
Vigracera is a well known local manufacturer of ceramic products. For construction project, I came here to check their tile product lines. I wanted to compare with Vietceramics.

The showroom offers many oversized tiles and catch eyes of visiors. These are not bad at all, but, compared with imports from Europe, China, and India, the tile design are not refined. It tends to be crude and lacks subtlety. It looks good on big showroom, but, could be tiring or boring if you look everyday at home. The price is not cheap either, on par with those from China dnd India. Vietnam tiles are still long way to go.

Additional note. This showroom was manned by a very few staff who lacks professional knowledge or motivation to help customers. It was disappointment. You should go to Vietceramics or Laxcasa for authentic tiles.
